top_signals.title: Big New BP Shareholder Adds to Stock Despite Boardroom Chaos
top_signals.summary: A large new investor in BP Plc topped up its holding after the shock firing of the oil major’s chairman last week, betting that the boardroom drama won’t derail the company’s strategic approach.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bessent backs summer push for Clarity Act, says bitcoin reserve moving at ‘deliberate speed’
top_signals.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the department is moving at a "deliberate speed" to establish a strategic bitcoin reserve.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Remaining anchored: Monetary Policy in an unpredictable world - speech by Andrew Bailey
top_signals.summary: Given at the Reykjavík Economic Conference 2026, Iceland
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Can AI make cutlery? -  speech by Andrew Bailey
top_signals.summary: Given at the 389th Cutlers’ Feast, Cutlers’ Hall, Sheffield
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Do Investors Have FOMO In These Markets?
top_signals.summary: Steve Sosnick, chief strategist at Interactive Brokers, and Kevin Gordon, head of macro research and strategy at the Schwab Center for Financial Research, discuss the fear of missing out in markets. They speak in New York on June 2 at a Bloomberg subscribers only event for the launch of Bloomberg Money. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: This Is the Moment for Stock Picking, Berry Says
top_signals.summary: Ann Berry, founder of Threadneedle Ventures, says she's not looking for value in energy anymore. She speaks in New York on June 2 at a Bloomberg subscribers only event for the launch of Bloomberg Money. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: George Santos’ Kalshi Wagers Draw Fresh Insider Trading Scrutiny
top_signals.summary: George Santos has emerged as the latest flashpoint in the controversy over possible insider trading on prediction markets, as concerns become increasingly widespread about potential illicit bets on the platforms.
